svg.title: InductOne CSA End-to-End Architecture Map
svg.desc: A visual architecture map of the InductOne CSA workflow from engineering governance through build configuration, release to builder, completion acceptance, instance creation, and validation evidence.
svg.text: Governed path from engineering-controlled source data to builder handoff, accepted as-built evidence, and lifecycle instance.
Robots work. People rule. Evidence survives context windows.
engineering identity, release approval, controlled catalog
build context, options, snapshot, hierarchy, CO
fixtures + candidate validation + production read-only proof + generated engineering deliverables

g.text: Release currently checks Top BOM signoff; helper exists for Top Item, Product Bundle, and selected Options but is not wired.
